gaps: 🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION — No test covers the scenario where location is denied during onboarding, then the user taps the device card on the Home/FMD screen, and the Data Collection dialog (not the location permission dialog) reappears. This is a distinct dialog (Data Collection vs. Location Permission) that is not covered by any existing test.

🧠 STATE TRIGGER GAP — The bug involves a specific trigger: tapping the device card on the Home screen after onboarding with location denied. Existing tests (65293013, 65293014) cover location permission re-prompting, but none cover the Data Collection dialog being triggered by device card tap. The state machine transition from 'onboarding completed with location denied' → 'tap device card' → 'Data Collection dialog shown' is untested.

🧠 PERSISTENCE GAP — No test verifies whether the Data Collection dialog's dismissal state (accepted or declined) persists across app lifecycle events (background/foreground, app kill/relaunch) when triggered from the device card tap. The bug may manifest differently after app restart.

🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY — The bug scenario does not specify which Poly device is connected. Different Poly devices (Sync 20, Sync 40, Free 60, Surround 85) have different FMD capabilities and device card behaviors. No existing test validates device card tap behavior across multiple device types when location is denied.

🧠 MISSING NEGATIVE TEST — No test validates that the Data Collection dialog should NOT reappear if the user has already accepted/declined data collection. The bug implies a regression where the dialog shows again incorrectly — this persistence of user preference is untested.

🧠 SCREEN NAVIGATION GAP — No test covers the navigation flow: Home screen (FMD) → tap device card → dialog appears. Existing tests focus on onboarding screens and location permission flows, but not the post-onboarding device card interaction.

generated_testcases.title: FMD_DataCollectionDialog_DeviceCardTap_LocationDenied_Onboarding
steps: Precondition: Fresh install or app data cleared. Location permission not granted at OS level.
Launch app and complete onboarding up to location permission prompt.
Observe Home/FMD screen loads with device card displayed.
Tap the device card on the Home/FMD screen.
generated_testcases.expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: Data Collection dialog (not Location Permission dialog) reappears. Actual (If Bug): Data Collection dialog is shown again despite onboarding being completed. Expected: No Data Collection dialog should appear — user preference from onboarding (location denied) should be respected. The Home screen should proceed to device detail screen without any dialog.

generated_testcases.title: FMD_DataCollectionDialog_DeviceCardTap_AfterAccept_Regression
steps: Precondition: Fresh install. Complete onboarding and accept data collection.
Tap device card to enter device detail screen.
generated_testcases.expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE: Data Collection dialog should NOT reappear after user has already accepted. Expected: No dialog shown on device card tap — user is taken directly to device detail screen. Actual (If Bug): Data Collection dialog reappears on device card tap after app restart, indicating preference persistence failure.

generated_testcases.title: FMD_DataCollectionDialog_DeviceCardTap_AfterDecline_AppKill
steps: Precondition: Fresh install. Complete onboarding and decline data collection.
IMMEDIATELY force-kill the app (do not navigate away first).
generated_testcases.expected: 🧠 IMMEDIATE STATE TRIGGER: Expected: No Data Collection dialog appears — the decline preference was saved immediately upon dismissal. Actual (If Bug): Data Collection dialog reappears after app kill+relaunch, indicating the dismissal state was not persisted synchronously before app termination.

generated_testcases.title: FMD_DataCollectionDialog_DeviceCardTap_BackgroundForeground
steps: Precondition: Fresh install. Complete onboarding with location denied.
On Home/FMD screen, tap device card — Data Collection dialog appears.
generated_testcases.expected: 🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION: Expected: Dialog persists across background/foreground (not auto-dismissed). After dismissal, tapping device card again should NOT show Data Collection dialog. Actual (If Bug): Dialog disappears on background/foreground, or reappears after second background cycle despite prior dismissal.

generated_testcases.title: FMD_DataCollectionDialog_DeviceCardTap_BluetoothReconnect
steps: Precondition: Fresh install. Complete onboarding with location denied. Device connected.
On Home/FMD screen, tap device card — Data Collection dialog appears.
Open app and tap device card.
generated_testcases.expected: 🧠 DEEP LIFECYCLE: Expected: No Data Collection dialog appears after Bluetooth reconnect — the decline preference persists across Bluetooth state transitions. Actual (If Bug): Data Collection dialog reappears after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect cycle, indicating state is tied to connection rather than user preference.

generated_testcases.title: FMD_DataCollectionDialog_DeviceCardTap_MultipleDeviceTypes
steps: Precondition: Run this test case separately for each device type: Sync 20, Sync 40, Free 60, Surround 85.
Fresh install. Complete onboarding with location denied.
On Home/FMD screen, tap device card.
generated_testcases.expected: 🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY: Expected behavior is identical across all device types: Data Collection dialog appears on first device card tap after onboarding with location denied, and does NOT reappear after dismissal + app restart. Actual (If Bug): Behavior differs per device — e.g., Sync 20 may show dialog repeatedly while Surround 85 respects preference, or vice versa. Document per-device results.

generated_testcases.title: FMD_DataCollectionDialog_DeviceCardTap_LocationGranted_Control
steps: Precondition: Fresh install. Complete onboarding with location GRANTED (Allow While Using App).
generated_testcases.expected: 🧠 MISSING NEGATIVE TEST (Control): Expected: No Data Collection dialog appears — user is taken directly to device detail screen. Actual (If Bug): Data Collection dialog appears even when location was granted, indicating the dialog trigger is not correctly scoped to location-denied state only.

generated_testcases.title: FMD_DataCollectionDialog_DeviceCardTap_RepeatedTaps
steps: Precondition: Fresh install. Complete onboarding with location denied.
On Home/FMD screen, tap device card rapidly 5 times in succession.
Tap device card again rapidly 5 times.
generated_testcases.expected: 🧠 STATE TRIGGER GAP: Expected: Dialog appears only once on first tap. Subsequent rapid taps should not stack multiple dialogs. After dismissal, rapid taps should not trigger dialog again. Actual (If Bug): Multiple overlapping dialogs appear, or dialog reappears on each rapid tap after dismissal.

generated_testcases.title: FMD_DataCollectionDialog_DeviceCardTap_PhoneReboot
steps: Precondition: Fresh install. Complete onboarding with location denied.
On Home/FMD screen, tap device card — Data Collection dialog appears.
generated_testcases.expected: 🧠 DEEP LIFECYCLE (Phone Reboot): Expected: No Data Collection dialog appears after phone reboot — the decline preference is persisted to disk and survives device reboot. Actual (If Bug): Data Collection dialog reappears after phone reboot, indicating preference is stored in memory only and not persisted.
